summary: Iteration 2 testing of Cherry Case final polish (8 fix areas). Backend: 25/25 pytest in /app/backend/tests/test_iter2.py — covers new user shape (balance/deposited/demo), admin add-stars credits BONUS only (deposited stays 0), crash real-mode spends bonus when no deposit, idempotent cashout (already_cashed flag, no double-pay, includes user), no consecutive crash repeats over 100 sequential calls, mines floor=1+picks*0.02 verified at 5x5 and 7x7 for picks 1/2/3, mines high-risk RTP still strong (5x5/24→~20.5x, 7x7/48→~40.18x), mines size 4 rejected & 3/5/7 accepted, /admin/users and /admin/player return bonus_balance, real-mode withdrawal creates verification block + short_id WD-XXXXXX + source_case_name + suspicious=true (no paid invoices) + email gracefully skipped (RESEND_API_KEY missing, no exception, email_sent absent), demo withdraw rejected, /api/cases and /api/live-drops preserved. Frontend: 13/13 Playwright — TopBar has NO promo-input; Mines warnings work for 5/3 LOW, 5/20 HIGH, 3/1 LOW, 3/7 HIGH, 7/5 LOW, 7/40 HIGH with correct RU text ('Низкий риск — маленький множитель' / 'Высокий риск'); low text does NOT contain 'высокий риск'; Top-Up modal title 'Пополнение баланса', contact-admin-link → https://t.me/RadioArseny, contact-admin-btn present, promo-input + promo-apply-btn inside modal, invalidcode → 'Promo code not found' toast, /admin promo opens admin-modal, wrong secret rejected, correct secret navigates to /admin. Admin page renders, shows 'dep: 0' and source case 'Basic Case' for withdrawal request.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1340 lines — recommend extracting admin / games / cases routers into separate modules for maintainability.

generate_crash_multiplier still uses a module-global _last_crash_multiplier for the no-repeat guarantee. Per-user no-repeat is correctly enforced by passing the user's previous crash_at from DB in /games/crash/start, which is good. The module-global is now effectively unused as a correctness mechanism and could be removed to avoid confusion.

_send_withdrawal_email runs as asyncio.create_task without awaiting — exceptions are swallowed inside the function but unhandled cancellation on shutdown is possible. Consider a background queue or store-then-poll pattern for production reliability.
withdraw_item: short_id collision possible (uuid hex[:6] uppercase = 16M combos). For low volume it is fine; add uniqueness index or retry-on-collide if scale grows.

spend_balance does NOT validate amount<=user.balance before $inc; relies on caller. Crash/Mines/Slots/Wheel/case-open all pre-check, which is correct, but a regression in any caller could push balance negative.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_<uuid12> users created via /api/auth/telegram fallback. Each gets balance=0, deposited_balance=0, demo_balance=1,000,000. Admin add-stars used to grant bonus stars during tests. One real-mode Basic Case opening created during withdrawal verification test (Teddy Bear, value 15).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 fix areas verified end-to-end. Backend public URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://game-patch-v2.preview.emergentagent.com (set in shell when running pytest, since it's only in frontend/.env). /api/me (not /api/profile). MinesRevealReq uses 'index' (not 'cell') — legacy test_cherry_case.py uses wrong field. RESEND_API_KEY intentionally missing — withdrawal API returns 200 and silently logs warning. spend_balance backfills deposited_balance via get_user. crash_cashout already_cashed:true on second call now returns full user object. Frontend slider values must be set via the native HTMLInputElement.value setter (React controlled inputs ignore plain value assignment).
rca of the issue: No outstanding bugs from this iteration. Previous iteration's note about cross-stream crash repeats is now mitigated server-side: crash_start fetches the user's own previous crash_at from db.crash_games and passes it to generate_crash_multiplier(prev_val), making the no-repeat guarantee per-user instead of process-global. Verified with 100 sequential calls → 0 consecutive repeats.
